NAME

string_constants.h - String literal constants.

SYNOPSIS

Macros


#define STR_ZERO '0'
String literal: 0"(zero). #define STR_ONE '1'
String literal: 1"(one). #define STR_FALSE 'false'
String literal: false". #define STR_TRUE 'true'
String literal: true". #define STR_OFF 'off'
String literal: off". #define STR_ON 'on'
String literal: on". #define STR_NO 'no'
String literal: no". #define STR_YES 'yes'
String literal: yes".

Detailed Description

String literal constants.
